compressed_prompt:
Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. In your response please avoid using commas.
 
<<fingerprint swap>>
response:
<<Fingerprint Swap>>

Lena is a brilliant but reckless forensic scientist who stumbles upon an experimental procedure that allows fingerprints to be temporarily transferred between two people. Desperate to escape her mundane life she convinces her cynical best friend Jake—a former thief with a knack for breaking into high-security places—to test the process.

At first the swap seems perfect. Lena gets to experience Jake’s thrill of infiltration while Jake enjoys the anonymity of her clean record. But when a botched job leaves Jake’s original prints at a crime scene the two realize the procedure has irreversible consequences. Their swapped prints begin to degrade leaving them both with partial identities and no way to prove who they really are.

As authorities close in Lena and Jake must race against time to reverse the swap before their fingerprints vanish forever. Along the way they uncover a conspiracy tied to the very technology that altered them—one that threatens to erase their existence entirely. With no allies and no proof of their true selves they must rely on each other to outsmart the system that turned them into ghosts.
